figures.caption: Figure 1: Workflow of the proposed HUMBR ensemble system. The system calculates consensus using a Hybrid Utility Function (Semantic + Lexical) and applies a consensus threshold 𝜏 to filter risky outputs.

Figure 4: Outcome Distribution Analysis. The stacked bars represent the full breakdown of 100% of samples. HUMBR (Top) greatly expands the “Success” rate (Teal) and reduces the “Recall Errors” (Gray).
Table 4: Detailed Failure Mode Breakdown. HUMBR dominates in quality and completeness.
Figure 2: Cost-𝑃fail Pareto Frontier: An idealized depiction of the operational trade-off landscape.
